title: HAUSPROFI Tea Infuser, 304 Stainless Steel Tea Strainer with Lid and Foldable Handle, Tea Filter for Teapots Cups Mugs to Brewing Steeping Loose Leaf, 1 Pack
features: SAFE AND HIGH-QUALITY: Made of premium 304 stainless steel, which is BPA free, odor-free, FDA approved. This Tea strainer does NOT contain any harmful chemicals, keeping your tea free from smell even in hot water, making it safer than using plastic ones.
FOLDABLE LONG HANDLES: The long foldable handle design protects against hurting your fingers and suitable for more tea bowls, cups, and teapots in various sizes.
DUAL-PURPOSE LID AND TRAY: The lid keeps the steeping flavor from evaporating and keeps water warm. Besides, it is a tray, holds the tea infuser, and avoids messy.

EXTRA FINE MESH: Say goodbye to debris floating around in your tea. With the fine mesh tea strainer, even finely chopped fine tea leaves can be easily caught, you can brew all types of tea, even tea with very fine particles. And large capacity allows the tea to circulate, instead of being cramped.
EASY TO CLEAN AND 100% GUARANTEE: Easy to clean and dishwasher safe. If have any questions, feel free to contact us. All problems will be solved within 24 hours.
description: Product Description Foldable Long Handle Food-Grade 304 Stainless Steel Dual-Purpose Tray or Lid For Teapots, Cups, Mugs Suitable for teapots, cups, mugs, and other tea containers which rim large than 5.5cm (2.16 inches) and less than 14.8cm (5.82 inches). Filtrates all Fine Loose Leaves Ultra-fine mesh catches small particles and keeps your tea clear. Very suitable for use at home and at work. Easy to Use and Clean Immerse your tea into water for a while, the design will helps to promotes water flow. Then remove the filter and enjoy your perfect tea. WIDE APPLICATION Suitable for filtrating the loose leaf of green tea, black tea, fruit tea, herbal tea, and the spice that need filtration. FEATURES Package Includes: 1 Pack Material: 304 Stainless Steel (Food Grade) FDA Approved Odor-Free Reusable Suitable for Cups ＞5.5cm and ＜14.8cm ENJOY TEATIME AT HOME OR WORK With HAUSPROFI Tea Infusers, it will be convenient to enjoy a cup of hot tea at home and at work. Reusable, Not Affect Taste Save cost and more healthy than using a teabag. The stainless steel tea strainer offers you good filtration, and you can get health from tea without compromising on taste. BEST GIFT It is also a good tea tool that ideal to share with friends or family who love to drink tea.
